AboutPage.heroBadge: Japan MLIT Official Data × Real Estate Professional Insights
AboutPage.heroTitle: Official Gov Data & Expert Analysis to Precisely Evaluate Properties.
AboutPage.heroDesc: Enter coordinates and instantly generate transaction price trends, hazard risk assessment, 10-section area characteristics, and expert insights. A precision research tool for real estate agents, investors, and property buyers in Japan.
AboutPage.heroNote: No credit card required · Start instantly with Google
AboutPage.featuresSectionTitle: Everything from Research to Presentation, on One Page
AboutPage.featuresSectionDesc: Cut hours of property research down to seconds. All the information professionals need, in one place.
AboutPage.f0desc: Based on actual transaction data from Japan's MLIT Property Information Library, instantly display average unit prices and price trend charts for the surrounding area — giving you objective data to support price negotiations.
AboutPage.f1desc: Display flood, landslide, and earthquake risks linked to official hazard maps. View zoning, school district, nearest station, and medical facilities — all in one place.
AboutPage.f2desc: Generate a detailed report covering area overview, demographics, development trends, investment value, future outlook, and property appeal — 10 sections in total. Dramatically streamline pre-negotiation research.
AboutPage.f3desc: Generate realistic lifestyle images reflecting the area's actual features (snowy regions, urban areas, coastal towns, etc.) — perfect for client presentation materials.
AboutPage.f4desc: One-click PDF export of a full research report including price summary, hazard data, charts, area report, and transaction listings. Customise which sections to include for client presentations.
AboutPage.f5desc: Automatically save past research results and images to the cloud. Replay any past search instantly — ideal for ongoing area research and comparing multiple properties.
AboutPage.pricingSectionDesc: From a no-signup trial to a full pro plan. Start for free.
AboutPage.pricingNote: ※ Prices may change without notice. Pro plan coming soon.
AboutPage.footerCredit: Uses Japan MLIT Property Information Library data (CC BY 4.0)

TermsPage.title: Terms of Service
TermsPage.s1p1: These Terms of Service govern the use of the web service "{service}" provided by {operator} ("Operator") between the Operator and all users ("Users").
TermsPage.s1p2: By using this service, Users are deemed to have agreed to all provisions of these Terms.
TermsPage.s2p1: This service is a web application that combines publicly available data from Japan's MLIT Property Information Library and other sources with real estate expertise to provide reference information on property markets in user-specified areas.
TermsPage.s2d1: Information provided by this service does not constitute a formal real estate appraisal under Japan's Real Estate Appraisal Act.
TermsPage.s2d2: Information provided by this service does not constitute investment advice or solicitation under Japan's Financial Instruments and Exchange Act.
TermsPage.s2d3: All information provided is for reference only. For any real estate purchase, sale, or investment decision, please consult a qualified professional (licensed real estate agent, appraiser, etc.) and act at your own responsibility.
TermsPage.s3i1: Some features require login via a Google account (Firebase Authentication).
TermsPage.s3i2: Users are responsible for the management of their own Google accounts.
TermsPage.s3i3: If unauthorised use of an account occurs, please contact the Operator immediately.
TermsPage.s3i4: Sharing a single account among multiple people is prohibited.
TermsPage.s4i1: This service offers a free plan and a paid Pro plan (¥980/month incl. tax). Features and limits follow what is displayed within the service.
TermsPage.s4i2: Paid plan payments are processed through Stripe, Inc. Credit card information is managed directly by Stripe and is not stored on Operator servers.
TermsPage.s4i3: The Pro plan may be cancelled at any time. Upon cancellation, access continues until the end of the billing month. No pro-rated refunds are provided, except for service-critical failures.
TermsPage.s4i4: Prices may change with advance notice on the service.
TermsPage.s5lead: Users must not engage in the following activities when using this service:
TermsPage.s5i1: Automated data collection (scraping, crawling, etc.) of service data or content
TermsPage.s5i2: Reverse engineering, decompiling, or disassembling the service
TermsPage.s5i3: Transferring, lending, or sharing accounts with third parties
TermsPage.s5i4: Unauthorised commercial use or resale of information obtained through this service
TermsPage.s5i5: Placing excessive load on the service's servers
TermsPage.s5i6: Any activity that violates laws or public order and morals
TermsPage.s5i7: Any other activity deemed inappropriate by the Operator
TermsPage.s6i1: All information provided by this service is for reference only. The Operator makes no guarantees as to accuracy, completeness, or timeliness, and accepts no liability for any damages arising from its use.
TermsPage.s6i2: The Operator accepts no liability for damages caused by system failures, maintenance, or outages of third-party services (Firebase, Stripe, MLIT API, etc.).
TermsPage.s6i3: The Operator may change or discontinue the service without prior notice.
TermsPage.s62i1: Area analysis reports and lifestyle images are automatically generated using generative AI (Gemini, Imagen, etc.) provided by Google LLC.
TermsPage.s62i2: AI-generated content may not reflect the latest information and may contain inaccuracies. Always verify with up-to-date sources before use.
TermsPage.s62i3: The Operator accepts no liability for any damages arising from AI-generated content.
TermsPage.s62i4: AI-generated images are illustrative only and do not guarantee the appearance or conditions of the actual area.
TermsPage.s63p1: Transaction price and hazard data provided by this service is derived from the following data sources, used in accordance with their respective licences.
TermsPage.s63i1: Japan MLIT Property Information Library (CC BY 4.0) — Transaction data
TermsPage.s63i2: Japan MLIT Hazard Map Portal — Flood & landslide risk data
TermsPage.s63i3: Geospatial Information Authority of Japan (GSI) Map Tiles — Map display
TermsPage.s7p1: Copyright and other intellectual property rights in the content (text, design, logos, report text, etc.) included in this service belong to the Operator or the respective rights holders.
TermsPage.s8p1: The Operator may amend these Terms at any time when deemed necessary. Amended Terms take effect upon publication on the service.
TermsPage.s9p1: These Terms are governed by the laws of Japan. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the Tokyo District Court as the court of first instance.

PrivacyPage.intro: {operator} ("Operator") sets out this Privacy Policy regarding the handling of personal information in {service} ("Service").
PrivacyPage.s1lead: When providing this service, we may collect the following information.
